'''Meres Ulcane''' was a soldier in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], who later staged a mutiny aboard his own [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and formed the [[Restored Empire|Kaarenth Dissension]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

Meres Ulcane joined the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] at the age of 17, thanks to the efforts of an influential uncle. However, Ulcane did not possess the skill needed to get ahead in the armed forces, and when he was assigned to a demolitions squad upon graduation, Ulcane suspected his superiors were trying to kill him off. Realizing a quick promotion was the only way forwards, Ulcane betrayed his squad, locking them in a warehouse owned by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and destroyed it.

Not only did Ulcane get away with this audacious act, but he was promoted for taking out a strategic enemy site and surviving the assault that claimed the lives of his squad-mates. Ulcane turned this luck to his advantage, progressing through the ranks under a number of similarly unusual circumstances. Now-[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Ulcane eventually became a student of alien cultures, in part because he was considered an outsider by his peers, and staged a mutiny on his own [[Starship/Legends|ship]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

Fleeing into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], Captain Ulcane met another [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] deserter, and together they formed the Kaarenth Dissension, designed to incite the alien races of the Outer Rim against the fledgling [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. However, Ulcane was discovered on [[Betha II]] by Republic agents, and fled to the [[Spawn Nebula/Legends|Spawn Nebula]], where the Dissension [[Navy/Legends|starfleet]] lay in hiding.

The New Republic tracked Ulcane to the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]], and [[Mission to the Spawn Nebula|infiltrated]] his headquarters. A large portion of the fleet was destroyed, and Meres Ulcane was killed aboard the Dissension repair station.
